title: Xizor cargo container
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Saruwen_station.jpg|thumb|right|[[Saruwen Station]]. Note the [[Class-D cargo container]]s floating in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] nearby.]]
The '''Xizor cargo container''' product line was a series of various-sized and modular freight containers designed to store cargo during transit in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]], they could be loaded onto a wide variety of [[Transport/Legends|transports]] and [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]]. The product line ranged from [[Class-A cargo container|Class-A]] through [[Class-L cargo container|Class-L]], each class offering different shapes, sizes, and suggested cargo. Xizor Transport Services containers were specially designed to protect their cargo against the rigors of space travel, but were also a cheap and useful place to store cargo outside a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] rather than occupying valuable pressurized volume inside. As a result, storage depots across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] had clusters of cargo containers floating in space near more permanent installations.
